summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CuratedCloset landing page - all core features working correctly
passed_tests: All backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
Landing page loads with all hero content elements
Email subscription form accepts valid emails and stores in MongoDB
Duplicate email submission shows proper validation error
Invalid email validation working (browser + API level)
Admin page displays subscriber list correctly
Glassmorphism CTA card is visible and styled correctly
Animated background elements (gradient orbs, noise overlay) present
Mobile responsive layout works on 390x844 viewport
Navigation between landing and admin pages works smoothly
Toast notification system working for user feedback
